note: seq=7 (queue): ALWAYS-ON enrichment workers. Fetch+sha-verify scripts/atlas_enrich_worker.py into /opt/atlas/enrich/; pip install psycopg2-binary+dnspython; --migrate (HETZNER ONLY) creates atlas.enrich_queue+atlas.field_provenance and seeds the queue from atlas.business; --selftest (ALL nodes) validates DB connect + FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED claim as a fail-loud gate; install atlas-enrich-worker@.service TEMPLATE (Type=simple, Restart=always, long-running loop that idles gracefully when the queue is empty) and enable+start instances @1 and @2 on EVERY node -- Hetzner AND InterServer both run workers against the Hetzner DB; SKIP LOCKED coordinates them so adding workers scales throughput. FREE methods only (website discovery, homepage/contact crawl, MX/DNS + email-pattern, tech-stack, firmographics, EDGAR/nonprofit/license xref). HONEST CEILING: company-level coverage ~88-92% free; verified personal direct-dials/personal emails are vendor-gated (~65-72% blended) and are NOT claimed -- personal emails are pattern HINTS only (field='email_pattern', confidence<=0.4). Non-overridable .gov/.mil contact suppression enforced in code. Progress (enriched/min, queue_remaining, per-field coverage %) surfaces to status/<node>/enrich-<node>.json. PLACEHOLDER seq=7 -- renumber to last_seq+1 when you publish (MUST come after seq-3 so atlas.business exists; independent of the seq-4/5/6 placeholders).

steps.note: seq=7: install always-on enrichment workers (template service x2 per node) + enrich_queue/field_provenance schema + queue seed; counts -> status-back

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/enrich/atlas_enrich_worker.py':'0d2b55534ceb88588291ba09d06c698b7d8f108cefbd428a92f5e374abd81673'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('sha ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS always-on enrichment worker (instance %i)
Documentation=https://github.com/cloudwalker171/atlas-manifests
After=network-online.target postgresql.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
Environment=ATLAS_WORKER_INSTANCE=%i
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/enrich/atlas_enrich_worker.py --loop
Restart=always
RestartSec=5
Nice=10
IOSchedulingClass=idle
TimeoutStopSec=30

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
